scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/bsa dist/heparin dist/phn-echo dist/gdp dist/predicted-hct && cp index.html dist/ && cp main.js dist/ && cp _redirects dist/ && cp bsa/index.html dist/bsa/ && cp heparin/index.html dist/heparin/ && cp phn-echo/index.html dist/phn-echo/ && cp gdp/index.html dist/gdp/ && cp predicted-hct/index.html dist/predicted-hct/
